body_text:
FYI â May 2020
FYI â May 2020
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Redeeming or Transferring Bonds Part
(formerly the Redeeming, Transferring, or Selling Bonds Part)
Section 4.6, Handling Non-Certified Instruments (NCI)
Updated to clarify that although Canada Savings Bonds are no longer available for purchase through a Payroll Savings Plan, the funds in an existing Payroll Savings Plan are guaranteed and will continue to earn interest until they reach maturity or are redeemed, whichever comes first.
We also replaced images of the government forms to match the 2019 versions on the Government of Canada website.
Questions

1-888-889-7878
